canonical_definition: A comprehensive benchmark for Chinese idiom understanding, assessing models across three tasks: evaluative connotation (sentiment classification), appropriateness (misuse detection), and open cloze (idiom generation in context), with 2,937 human-verified examples covering 1,765 idioms.
papers: Integral Transformer: Denoising Attention, Not Too Much Not Too Little

definitions.text: A comprehensive benchmark for Chinese idiom understanding, assessing models across three tasks: evaluative connotation (sentiment classification), appropriateness (misuse detection), and open cloze (idiom generation in context), with 2,937 human-verified examples covering 1,765 idioms.
definitions.paper: Integral Transformer: Denoising Attention, Not Too Much Not Too Little

relationships.paper: Integral Transformer: Denoising Attention, Not Too Much Not Too Little
relationships.evidence: We present CHENGYU-BENCH, the first comprehensive benchmark for Chinese idiom understanding, built from diverse, naturally occurring texts. (Section 1)

emnlp25: Integral Transformer: Denoising Attention, Not Too Much Not Too Little
